---
title: 'I Trust Mike'
date: '2020-05-11T07:14:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1099969506134545440'
blogger_filename: '/2020/05/i-trust-mike.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
---

I can always trust my Addict to be an addict.<div><br></div><div>I can always trust me to be...</div><div><br></div><div>I can always trust him to....</div>
